title: AAEP Event: agent.session.cancelled
description: Announces that the session was cancelled before completion. Cancellation may originate from the user, the producer itself, a timeout, or an external system. Defined normatively in Chapter 4 §4.1.4 of the AAEP specification.

cancelled_by.description: Source of the cancellation. Determines how subscribers might frame the announcement to the user.

summary_normal.description: Human-readable description of why the cancellation occurred. Required.

summary_detailed.description: Longer form with additional context about the cancellation.

cancellation_reason.description: Producer-specific reason code for the cancellation. Conventionally a short snake_case identifier.

partial_result.description: Brief description of any partial work produced before cancellation. Helps users decide whether to retry from scratch or resume.

examples.summary_normal: Retirement plan generation cancelled at your request.
examples.partial_result: Initial projection was drafted but no recommendations were generated.

examples.summary_normal: Session timed out after 5 minutes of inactivity.
examples.summary_detailed: Session was awaiting user confirmation for 300 seconds; default decision applied and session cancelled.
